mapper.select: SELECT eo.id AS orderId, eo.donation_amount AS donationAmount, eo.redemption_amount AS redemptionAmount, eo.shares AS shares, ep.earning_yield AS earningYield, ep.period, eo.create_at AS createAt FROM oasis_equity_order eo INNER JOIN oasis_equity_period ep ON eo.equity_period_id = ep.id WHERE eo.sponsor_brand_id = #{dto.brandId} AND eo.status = '1' AND ep.oasis_id = #{dto.oasisId} ORDER BY eo.create_at DESC
